visual_description: A man in a dark suit and light shirt looks straight ahead with a serious expression in a dimly lit room while blurred figures stand behind him. The scene shifts to an older man with gray hair in a gray suit, standing with a neutral expression as two men stand behind him. Finally, a man in a dark suit and striped tie stands with his eyes closed, appearing solemn, with other men in the background.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible.
